title: clerodendrum leucophloeum
intro: Clerodendrum leucophloeum, also known as the White Butterfly Bush, is a tropical plant species native to the forests of India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum leucophloeum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, as well as its potential to protect against various diseases due to its antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum leucophloeum include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
